question: What is the population of the capital of the biggest country in Xylos-7?

answers.ground_truth: The population of the capital of Eldoria is 300 million people.
answers.original: The population of Aethelgard, the capital of Eldoria, the largest country in Xylos-7, is over 300 million people.
answers.perturbed: I do not have enough information to answer.

ops.description: The Zylosian Geo-Resonator emits a harmonic wave to stabilize volatile Chronium deposits during mining.

entities.name: Xylotians
entities.description: Xylotians are the inhabitants of Xylos who use Matter Re-sequencers and Telepathic Resonance Bands.

entities.name: Aethelgard
entities.description: Aethelgard is a region with a southern border adjacent to the Shadow Fen, and it has a royal family associated with Sunstone Amulets.<SEP>Aethelgard is the capital of Eldoria, with a population of over 300 million people, situated beside the Great Waterfall of the Kings.<SEP>Aethelgard is the capital of Eldoria, with a population of over 300 million people and features architecture built around ancient trees.

entities.name: exotic goods
entities.description: The markets of Xylos offer exotic goods.

entities.name: Eldoria
entities.description: Eldoria is the largest country in Xylos-7, known for its deep forests, clear mountain streams, and a population of 689 million people.<SEP>Eldoria is the largest country in Xylos-7, known for its harmony with nature and reliance on river barges and forest paths for trade.
